$comment: Source of truth for the apodictic:viz_manifest block (Manuscript-Structure Visualizations). Validated by scripts/apodictic_artifacts.py (stdlib subset checker) via scripts/viz_manifest.py. The manifest holds ONLY traceable data copied verbatim from existing artifacts (Timeline Event-Ledger rows + apodictic.finding.v1 blocks); it carries NO visual-style fields — the severity->encoding map is hardcoded in the renderer. The subset engine validates only this wrapper; viz_manifest.py validates the nested scenes[]/findings[] objects, enforces the no-style allowlist (E1), and byte-checks provenance against the sources (E2/E4). See docs/manuscript-visualizations.md.
title: APODICTIC manuscript-structure visualization manifest (apodictic.viz_manifest.v1)
